description_long: This is a short section of a wooden picket fence, featuring three vertical pickets with pointed tops. The pickets are evenly spaced and attached to two horizontal rails, one near the base and one slightly above the midpoint. The wood has a dark brown, natural grain finish, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The pointed tops of the pickets add a classic, traditional look, often seen in residential yards or gardens. The construction appears solid, with no visible decorative embellishments or hardware. This type of fence is commonly used to demarcate property boundaries or provide a modest barrier in urban and suburban environments.
description: A dark brown wooden picket fence section with three pointed pickets and two horizontal rails, featuring a classic, rustic design.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the thinness of the fence and the alignment of the pickets and rails.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three pointed pickets and two horizontal rails, highlighting the classic picket fence design.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, similar to view 0, showing the fence's narrow depth.
description_view_3: Rear view of the fence, showing the same three pointed pickets and two horizontal rails, with the rails more prominently visible.
